name: proc_creation_win_apt_hafnium
raw_query: any where (process.command_line:"*attrib*" and process.command_line:"* +h *" and process.command_line:"* +s *" and process.command_line:"* +r *" and process.command_line:"*.aspx*") or (process.executable:"*\\ProgramData\\VSPerfMon\\*" or (process.command_line:"*schtasks*" and process.command_line:"*VSPerfMon*")) or (process.executable:"*Opera_browser.exe" and (process.parent.executable like~ ("*\\services.exe", "*\\svchost.exe"))) or process.executable:"*Users\\Public\\opera\\Opera_browser.exe" or (process.command_line:"*vssadmin list shadows*" and process.command_line:"*Temp\\__output*") or (process.executable:"*\\makecab.exe" and (process.command_line:"*inetpub\\wwwroot\\*" and process.command_line:"*.dmp.zip*")) or (process.executable:"*\\makecab.exe" and (process.command_line like~ ("*Microsoft\\Exchange Server\\*", "*compressionmemory*", "*.gif*"))) or (process.command_line:"* -t7z *" and process.command_line:"*C:\\Programdata\\pst*" and process.command_line:"*\\it.zip*") or (process.command_line:"*\\comsvcs.dll*" and process.command_line:"*Minidump*" and process.command_line:"*full *" and process.command_line:"*\\inetpub\\wwwroot*") or (process.command_line like~ ("*Windows\\Temp\\xx.bat*", "*Windows\\WwanSvcdcs*", "*Windows\\Temp\\cw.exe*"))
